queries.question: Can you list all airports, including their names, cities, contact numbers, and websites?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    id, 
    Name, 
    City, 
    Phone_Number, 
    Website 
FROM 
    Airports
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?id ?name ?city ?phone_number ?website WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airports p:id ?id .
  ?airports p:name ?name .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airports p:Phone_Number ?phone_number .
  ?airports p:Website ?website .
}

queries.question: List all the airports established before 1950, including their ids, states and websites.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    id, 
    Name, 
    State, 
    Website 
FROM 
    Airports 
WHERE 
 Year_Established < 1950
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?id ?name ?state ?website WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airports p:id ?id .
  ?airports p:name ?name .
  ?airports p:State ?state .
  ?airports p:Website ?website .
  ?airports p:Year_Established ?year_established_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?year_established_f) < 1950)
}

queries.question: What are the airports that were established before 1950, and can you provide their ids, locations and websites?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    id, 
    Name, 
    City, State, 
    Website 
FROM 
    Airports 
WHERE 
 Year_Established < 1950
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?id ?name ?city ?state ?website WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airports p:id ?id .
  ?airports p:name ?name .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airports p:State ?state .
  ?airports p:Website ?website .
  ?airports p:Year_Established ?year_established_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?year_established_f) < 1950)
}
